'''Spiz's gang''' were a gang of young miscreants who terrorized the slums of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. They were lead by [[Spiz]] and included a [[H'nemthe (species)/Legends|H'nemthe]], a [[Kubaz/Legends|Kubaz]] and a number of other [[Alien/Legends|aliens]].

One of their frequent victims was a [[Unidentified child (Coruscant)|child]] whom they beat up for fun. On one such occasion, in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], they were scared off by a [[Mind trick/Legends|Force illusion]] of a [[Rancor/Legends|rancor]] created by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Yarael Poof/Legends|Yarael Poof]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Zam Wesell]]''
